ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_types" (
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text type */,
  "text_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the text type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the text type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the text type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "text_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of text */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "total_pages" INTEGER /* Total number of pages in the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the book is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_text_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_type_id") REFERENCES text_types ("text_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the chapter belongs to */,
  "chapter_title" TEXT /* Title of the chapter */,
  "chapter_number" INTEGER /* Number of the chapter */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the chapter */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the chapter */,
  "sentence_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sentences in the chapter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the chapter is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chapter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chapter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chapters_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_windows" (
  "window_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text window */,
  "chapter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chapter the window belongs to */,
  "window_number" INTEGER /* Number of the window within the chapter */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the window within the chapter */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the window within the chapter */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the text window */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the text window */,
  "sentence_count" INTEGER /* Total number of sentences in the text window */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the text window is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text window record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text window record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_windows_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "linguistic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of linguistic metrics */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text window the metrics are calculated for */,
  "avg_word_len" REAL /* Average word length */,
  "avg_sen_len_words" REAL /* Average sentence length in words */,
  "avg_sen_len_chars" REAL /* Average sentence length in characters */,
  "richness" REAL /* Linguistic richness */,
  "shannon_entropy" REAL /* Shannon entropy */,
  "avg_compound_words" REAL /* Average compound words */,
  "syllable_count" INTEGER /* Average number of syllables per word */,
  "flesch_kincaid_grade_level" REAL /* Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level readability score */,
  "flesch_reading_ease" REAL /* Flesch Reading Ease readability score */,
  "gunning_fog_index" REAL /* Gunning Fog Index readability score */,
  "coleman_liau_index" REAL /* Coleman-Liau Index readability score */,
  "ari" REAL /* Automated Readability Index */,
  "smog_index" REAL /* SMOG Index readability score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_linguistic_metrics_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES text_windows ("window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text window being revised */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Number of the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the revised text window */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the revision is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES text_windows ("window_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_revisions" (
  "revision_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of linguistic metrics for a revision */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision the metrics are calculated for */,
  "avg_word_len" REAL /* Average word length */,
  "avg_sen_len_words" REAL /* Average sentence length in words */,
  "avg_sen_len_chars" REAL /* Average sentence length in characters */,
  "richness" REAL /* Linguistic richness */,
  "shannon_entropy" REAL /* Shannon entropy */,
  "avg_compound_words" REAL /* Average compound words */,
  "syllable_count" INTEGER /* Average number of syllables per word */,
  "flesch_kincaid_grade_level" REAL /* Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level readability score */,
  "flesch_reading_ease" REAL /* Flesch Reading Ease readability score */,
  "gunning_fog_index" REAL /* Gunning Fog Index readability score */,
  "coleman_liau_index" REAL /* Coleman-Liau Index readability score */,
  "ari" REAL /* Automated Readability Index */,
  "smog_index" REAL /* SMOG Index readability score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_revisions_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, author, researcher) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text window or revision */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text window being accessed */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision being accessed (optional) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text window or revision was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES text_windows ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text window the report is generated for */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision the report is generated for (optional) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., readability, complexity) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES text_windows ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "window_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text window the annotation is added to */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision the annotation is added to (optional) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the annotation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the annotation is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_window_id FOREIGN KEY ("window_id") REFERENCES text_windows ("window_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES revisions ("revision_id")
)
